software_platform.why: 平台型公司常有高毛利與折舊差異，PS/FCF margin 比單一 PE 更穩定。
software_platform.gaps: FCF margin, gross profit, Rule of 40, AI revenue purity

high_margin_equipment.why: 高毛利成長股優先測試 forward earnings 與 implied CAGR 是否能解釋估值。
high_margin_equipment.gaps: forward estimate history, backlog, gross margin, customer concentration

capital_intensive.why: 資本密集產業需要同時看 EBITDA、折舊、利用率與 ROIC。

odm_ems.why: 低毛利代工不適合高 PS，應看 EBIT/EBITDA 與現金轉換。
odm_ems.gaps: EBIT margin, FCF conversion, working capital, pass-through revenue

components_power_cooling.why: 元件、電力與散熱供應鏈通常以 earnings multiple 搭配 margin stability 驗證。
components_power_cooling.gaps: gross margin stability, backlog, customer qualification, ASP trend

materials_cyclical.why: 材料與循環股需避免用高峰 EPS 判斷便宜，PB 與 normalized EBITDA 更保守。
materials_cyclical.gaps: mid-cycle margin, inventory cycle, commodity spread, ROIC

utilities_power.why: 資產型與電力基礎設施需看 book value、regulated return 與專案現金流。
utilities_power.gaps: regulated ROE, load growth, project cash flow, financing cost
